html:
<!DOCTYPE html>
<html lang="en">
<head>
<meta charset="UTF-8">
<meta name="viewport" content="width=device-width, initial-scale=1.0">
<style>
  html, body { margin:0; padding:0; width:100%; height:100%; overflow:hidden; background:#fff; }
  svg { width:100%; height:100%; }
  .tooltip { position:fixed; background:rgba(0,0,0,0.55); color:#fff; font:11px/1.4 sans-serif; padding:3px 8px; border-radius:4px; pointer-events:none; z-index:100; white-space:nowrap; }
</style>
</head>
<body>
<svg viewBox="0 0 600 373" preserveAspectRatio="xMidYMid meet">
  <defs>
    <marker id="arr" markerWidth="6" markerHeight="6" refX="5" refY="3" orient="auto">
      <path d="M0,0 L0,6 L6,3 z" fill="#333"/>
    </marker>
  </defs>
  <!-- Circles for (a) -->
  <g id="group-a">
    <g>
      <!-- Define the grid positions for circles in (a) -->
      <script>
        for (let i = 0; i < 5; i++) {
          for (let j = 0; j < 7; j++) {
            const cx = 70 + j * 35;
            const cy = 50 + i * 35;
            document.write(`<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="20" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>`);
          }
        }
      </script>
    </g>
    <text x="125" y="250" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">(a)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Circles for (b) -->
  <g id="group-b">
    <g>
      <!-- Define the positions for circles in (b) -->
      <script>
        let radii = [35, 30, 25, 20, 15, 10, 5];
        radii.forEach((r, i) => {
          const step = Math.floor(10 / r); // Increase number of circles as size decreases
          for (let j = 0; j < step; j++) {
            const angle = (j / step) * Math.PI;
            const cx = 425 + Math.cos(angle) * (100 - i * 10);
            const cy = 175 - Math.sin(angle) * (100 - i * 10);
            document.write(`<circle cx="${cx}" cy="${cy}" r="${r}" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" fill="none"/>`);
          }
        });
      </script>
    </g>
    <text x="450" y="250" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">(b)</text>
  </g>

  <!-- Arrows -->
  <line x1="125" y1="50" x2="125" y2="150" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="70" y1="100" x2="280" y2="100" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="425" y1="175" x2="425" y2="275" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>
  <line x1="375" y1="225" x2="550" y2="225" stroke="#000" stroke-width="1.5" marker-end="url(#arr)"/>

  <!-- Labels -->
  <text x="130" y="40" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">v</text>
  <text x="285" y="105" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">u</text>
  <text x="430" y="165" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">v</text>
  <text x="555" y="230" font-size="11" font-family="sans-serif">u</text>
</svg>

<script>
  let tooltip = document.createElement('div');
  tooltip.className = 'tooltip';
  document.body.appendChild(tooltip);

  const svg = document.querySelector('svg');
  const groups = svg.querySelectorAll('g[id^="group-"]');

  groups.forEach(group => {
    group.addEventListener('mousemove', e => {
      const rect = e.target.getBoundingClientRect();
      tooltip.style.left = (e.clientX + 12) + 'px';
      tooltip.style.top = (e.clientY - 28) + 'px';
      tooltip.style.display = 'block';
      tooltip.textContent = group.id === 'group-a' ? 'Uniform Circle Grid' : 'Log-polar Circle Grid';
    });

    group.addEventListener('mouseleave', e => {
      tooltip.style.display = 'none';
    });

    group.addEventListener('click', () => {
      showPopup('Circle Pattern', group.id === 'group-a' ? 'This represents a uniform circular grid.' : 'This shows a log-polar circular grid.');
    });
  });

  function showPopup(title, body) {
    window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title, body }, '*');
  }

  function hidePopup() {
    window.parent.postMessage({ type: 'alex-popup', title: null }, '*');
  }

  document.addEventListener('keydown', e => {
    if (e.key === 'Escape') hidePopup();
  });

  svg.addEventListener('click', e => {
    if (e.target === svg || e.target.tagName === 'svg') hidePopup();
  });
</script>
</body>
</html>
